watchlist.notes: Early-stage edtech specialist (ClassDojo, Handshake). Moving beyond pure growth metrics to measurable learning outcomes; backs AI plus human creativity reshaping pedagogy, assessment and infrastructure, not tools that merely digitize the status quo.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Pre-K to Gray lifelong learning, return on education.
watchlist.notes: Edtech across K-12, higher ed and workforce. 'Pre-K to Gray' lifelong-learning thesis: scalable platforms, data-driven personalized learning and return on education (learning outcomes plus career readiness).

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Edtech podcast and community, not a check-writer.
watchlist.notes: Edtech Insiders. Market voice tracked for signal, not deal flow.
Education thinker on disruption and blended learning; adjacent voice, not a primary check-writer.
